description: Default Custom Dashboard for Doris Cloud

panels.description:
Queries per seconds on each Frontends.
Queries only include Select requests.
panels.title: QPS

panels.description: 99 quantiles of query latency on each Frontends.

targets.expr: max by (instance) (doris_fe_query_latency_ms{job="$cluster_id", quantile="0.99", group="fe", instance=~"$fe_instance", user=""})

panels.title: 99th Latency

targets.expr: sum by (instance) (rate(doris_be_num_io_bytes_read_from_cache{job="$cluster_id", group="be", compute_group=~"$compute_group", name=~".*"}[$__rate_interval])) / (sum by (instance) (rate(doris_be_num_io_bytes_read_total{job="$cluster_id", group="be",compute_group=~"$compute_group", name=~".*"}[$__rate_interval])) + 1e-10)

sum(doris_be_disk_bytes_read{job="$cluster_id", compute_group=~"$compute_group", instance=~"$be_instance", device=~".*"}) by (job, instance) / sum(doris_be_disk_read_time_ms{job="$cluster_id", compute_group=~"$compute_group", instance=~"$be_instance", device=~".*"}) by (job, instance) / 1048576

sum(doris_be_disk_bytes_written{job="$cluster_id", compute_group=~"$compute_group", instance=~"$be_instance", device=~".*"}) by (job, instance) / sum(doris_be_disk_read_time_ms{job="$cluster_id", compute_group=~"$compute_group", instance=~"$be_instance", device=~".*"}) by (job, instance) / 1048576

100 - sum by(job, instance) (rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{job="$cluster_id",mode="idle",group=~"$node_exporter_group"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by(job, instance) (rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{job="$cluster_id",group=~"$node_exporter_group"}[$__rate_interval])) * 100

sum by(job, instance) (node_memory_MemTotal_bytes{job="$cluster_id",group=~"$node_exporter_group"} - node_memory_MemFree_bytes{job="$cluster_id",group=~"$node_exporter_group"} - node_memory_Cached_bytes{job="$cluster_id",group=~"$node_exporter_group"} - node_memory_Buffers_bytes{job="$cluster_id",group=~"$node_exporter_group"} - node_memory_SReclaimable_bytes{job="$cluster_id",group=~"$node_exporter_group"}) / sum by(job, instance) (node_memory_MemTotal_bytes{job="$cluster_id",group=~"$node_exporter_group"}) * 100

panels.description:
The max replayed meta data journal id on Frontends.
Normally, all Frontends should be same on this metrics, or just slightly different for a short period.
panels.title: Max Replayed Journal ID

panels.description: The edit log size for each FE
panels.title: Edit Log Size

panels.description: The image clean of each FE
panels.title: Image Clean

panels.description: The file descriptor usage of Backends. Left Y axes shows the used fd num. Right Y axes shows the soft limit open file number.
panels.title: BE FD Count

panels.description: Number of tablets of each Backends
panels.title: Tablet Distribution

title: Default Custom Doris Cloud Dashboard Overview
